title: Prefer list comprehensions over constructors around generator expressions
description: Avoid using constructors around generator expressions in preference of list comprehensions.
recommendation: Use list comprehensions instead of constructors around generator expressions

noncompliant.code: class Foo: def __iter__(): yield from (x for x in range(10) if x % 2 == 0)
noncompliant.description: Use of constructor around generator expression

compliant.code: class Foo: def __iter__(): yield from [x for x in range(10) if x % 2 == 0]
compliant.description: Use of list comprehension instead of constructor around generator expression

why_is_this_an_issue: List comprehensions improve readability and maintainability while being more pythonic.
how_to_fix: Replace constructors around generator expressions with list comprehensions.
